name: bob
description: MCP servers, CLI tools, and development workflow skills

grit.description: Git operations via MCP — stage, commit, push, log, blame, and more

get-hubbed.description: GitHub CLI wrapper via MCP — issues, pull requests, and repos

lux.description: LSP multiplexer via MCP — hover, definitions, references, and symbols

mgp.description: Model graph protocol — query and execute MCP tools via GraphQL

chix.description: Nix MCP server and skills for Claude Code — build, evaluate, search, and manage flakes

robin.description: BATS integration testing skill with bundled assertion libraries, sandcastle isolation, and justfile patterns

tap-dancer.description: TAP-14 writer libraries (Go + Rust) and skill for producing spec-compliant TAP output

sandcastle.description: Sandbox runtime for wrapping security boundaries around arbitrary processes

and-so-can-you-repo.description: Interactive scaffold for creating new Nix-flake-backed repositories

potato.description: Pomodoro timer that detaches from terminal sessions
